The living and dining areas are combined to provide an open and inviting atmosphere for family gatherings. A modular kitchen fitted with a chimney and supported by a piped gas connection adds to everyday convenience. With 3 to 4 lifts available in the tower, accessibility and ease of movement are well ensured.::::Locality::::Jagatpur is a rapidly developing residential locality in Ahmedabad known for its organised infrastructure and connectivity. The apartment is located on the main road and benefits from proximity to essential facilities. Reputed schools and hospitals are available within a radius of 6 km, while everyday conveniences such as supermarkets, banks and public transport options are easily accessible. A metro line is also proposed in the vicinity, further enhancing future connectivity and making this address increasingly desirable.
